Volunteer

More hands means more dogs.

People assume enough help is already there. It is not. More hands means more dogs get walked, transported, treated, and placed.

Start volunteer form Email volunteer team

Starting role board

Specific asks beat generic goodwill.

These are the kinds of jobs that turn willingness into actual help: walking, transport, medical care support, and admin triage.

Open role

Saturday morning dog walker

When
Saturday mornings, target window 9 to 12
Where
Riverside, exact location confirmed after intake
Experience
No experience needed for some dogs. Large-breed comfort preferred.

As needed

Transport driver

When
One or two runs a month
Where
Riverside to shelter, vet, foster, or partner rescue
Experience
Licensed, insured, calm with large dogs.

Care support

Medical care helper

When
Target window 5 to 7 on selected weekdays
Where
Confirmed care location
Experience
Some dog care experience preferred.

Remote support

Admin and DM triage

When
Flexible weekly block
Where
Remote, with the rescue process
Experience
Clear writing, good judgment, no drama.

First-party volunteer form

Tell us where you can actually help.

Specific availability beats vague enthusiasm. Pick the roles you can show up for, then the rescue can route you cleanly.

01Contact
02Role fit
Ways you can help

List days, times, and how often you can show up.

03Notes

This prepares a clean email packet to info@underdogheroes.org so the rescue gets your answers in one place.

Underdog Heroes

Riverside, California rescue for power-breed dogs most people already counted out.

Adopt: Adopt@underdogheroes.org Foster: Foster@underdogheroes.org Volunteer: info@underdogheroes.org Instagram
